Scratchpad to hold temporary notes, should ideally be automated to create section with date on each entry.

i.e. 
--- 24APR22 ---

Todo-list:
* Prep food for upcoming week
* Apply for 1 dev job
* Start work on front-page of torhuus.com <> brianlovin/paul stammy
* Look at upcoming week, and set tasks and time blocks for each day


--- --- --- --- ---
